_comment: STELLA LACE v2 — SA3 Tips準拠プロンプト（自然文 + featuring/solo + タイトル指定）

bgm.name: title
bgm.prompt: TrackType: Music, VocalType: Instrumental, Genre: Electronic Orchestral Rock, Format: Band. A majestic sci-fi title screen track titled 'Starweavers Overture', featuring a delicate piano lead solo that opens into a soaring synth melody. Supported by full orchestral strings, a driving electronic beat, and powerful electric guitar riffs. The mood is mysterious, epic, and awe-inspiring. Well-arranged composition with intro piano building to full band climax and resolving to a quiet starfield ending. Live. 100 BPM. 44.1k Hz, high-quality, stereo.
bgm.negative_prompt: vocals, rap, acoustic only, lo-fi, chiptune, 8-bit, calm, peaceful, simple, minimal
